title: Automatic discharge
doc_html:
Art. 33.  Automatic discharge

A peace bond is automatically discharged at the end of thirty days from the expiration of the period specified therein, unless a proceeding to declare a forfeiture has been brought within that time.
doc_text:
Art. 33.  Automatic discharge
A peace bond is automatically discharged at the end of thirty days from the expiration of the period specified therein, unless a proceeding to declare a forfeiture has been brought within that time.
